title: phyllanthus scopulorum
intro: Phyllanthus scopulorum, also known as the cliff barberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phyllanthus scopulorum include its potential to aid in liver health, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Phyllanthus scopulorum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
